text: I find myself in a modern, almost futuristic environment. The transparent glass, bright lighting, and clean design invite a sense of curiosity and possibility. The R+D signage reminds me that I am in a space of innovation and learning. I feel both stimulated by the intellectual energy surrounding me and slightly dwarfed by the scale and sterility of the architecture. There is potential here, but also a gentle reminder of my own small place within a vast system of knowledge and technology.
